Lyrics.text:
Akaikinao, ry Tompo tia
Ho tena akaikinao,
No faniriako ka avia,
Hatòny aho izao.

Akaikinao no mahatamana,
Ny tena akaikinao,
Fa eo dia lavitra Satana
Satria resinao.

Akaikinao no misy hery,
Dia eo akaikinao;
Hizorana an-dalan-tery
Mankany Aminao.

Akaikinao ny fahoriana,
Raha tena akaikinao,
Dia mody re ho fifaliana
Sy fitahiana izao.

Akaikinao no ahitana,
Eny, eo akaikinao,
Ny Tavanao ’zay fahazavana
Sy tokiko izao.

Akaikinao tsy ho ela intsony
Ho tena akaikinao,
Rehefa tonga any ambony
Eo anatrehanao.
